title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power – Mega-Sonic® Plug-In Twin-Speaker Pest Repeller - Professional Ultrasonic Technology Repels Mice & Rats Instantly - Indoor Electric Powered Plug-in – Pet-Friendly
features: PROFESSIONAL-GRADE PEST REPELLER - This mega-sonic plug-in pest deterrent tackles rodent infestations with twin-speaker technology that delivers double the power and effectiveness. With wide-angle ultrasonic coverage up to 60m², it's a humane rat & mouse repellent for homes and outbuilding

SAFE ULTRASONIC PROTECTION – Achieve a pest-free indoor environment as this ultrasonic mouse repeller continuously releases powerful mega-sonic attack waves. Poison-free and safe for children and pets, the waves are undetectable to humans, making it a discreet but powerful rodent deterrent

QUICK & EASY SETUP – Simply plug in the mega-sonic mouse repellent directly into a socket for non-stop, long-term effectiveness. No batteries or cables needed. With a test button for reassurance, it can be used as a curative treatment to deter rodents or as a follow-up preventative treatment

EASY MAINTENANCE – Backed by a two-year assurance, this ultrasonic repeller provides peace of mind and lasting rodent protection. Built for durability, it effectively prevents infestations in rodent-prone areas, giving you a maintenance-free, reliable solution for pest control

ULTRA POWER RODENT CONTROL - Our high-performance Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in rodent control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems

Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. Ready-for-use bait blocks for the control of rats and mice indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings. Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. The ideal repellent for hard-to-reach areas without mains power, providing continuous ultrasonic protection for up to three months. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
